summary: ANDROID 🟥 FMD | When onboarding and 'Dont allow' for location selected then in FMD in main settings dialog keep showing
scenario: Location permission dialog repeatedly pops up in FMD main settings after denying location access during onboarding
description_clean: When onboarding with 'Don't allow' selected for location access, the FMD location permission dialog keeps popping up repeatedly in the main settings. Steps: 1) Install and open the app. 2) During onboarding, select 'Don't allow' for location. 3) Complete onboarding and go to FMD in main settings. 4) Select device and check for alert play button. 5) Enable location in Android settings. 6) Go back to FMD and check alert play button. Observed: The location collection dialog keeps popping up. When user goes to FMD in device settings, it opens correctly and tone can be played. When returning to FMD in main settings, tone can also be played. The bug appears to reproduce only once initially and then no longer appears.
steps: During onboarding, select 'Don't allow' for location access.
Complete onboarding and navigate to FMD in main settings.
Select a device and check for the alert play button.
Go back to FMD and check the alert play button.
expected: The location permission dialog should not appear repeatedly after selecting 'Don't allow' during onboarding. The FMD screen should open correctly and the tone should be playable without repeated permission prompts.
actual: The location collection dialog keeps popping up repeatedly. When the user goes to FMD in device settings, it opens correctly and the tone can be played. When returning to FMD in main settings, the tone can also be played. The bug appears to reproduce only once initially and then no longer appears.
